evals.prompt: A customer emailed me a Diagnostics-Report.html generated by the latest Diagnostics framework. It has script#diagnostics-report-data, several sessions, and errors in the newest session. Analyze what likely happened and tell me where to look next.
evals.expected_output: Extracts the embedded JSON instead of summarizing rendered HTML, focuses on newest sessions and error events, and returns a concise evidence-backed support/debug summary.

evals.prompt: This is an older Diagnostics HTML report without embedded JSON. Inspect the session logs and summarize the likely crash cause without dumping all logs.
evals.expected_output: Falls back to legacy HTML parsing, identifies session metadata and error/crash-like entries, and avoids restating the full report.

evals.prompt: This report contains both historic legacy sessions and newer structured sessions after an app update. Determine whether the reported issue started before or after the update.
evals.expected_output: Recognizes mixed-format sessions as expected, treats crash-like system lines as legacy crash evidence when no structured crash event exists, prefers structured crash events when present, and cites timestamps/version metadata when reasoning about the app update boundary.
